# CodzHub Brand Assets Intake

Official SVG assets from `Identity_Pack/Logos/SVG/` will be copied here in a later step.

## Target Filenames:
- `codzhub-logo-light.svg` (copied from `Identity_Pack/Logos/SVG/CodzHub_Main_Light.svg`)
- `codzhub-logo-dark.svg` (copied from `Identity_Pack/Logos/SVG/CodzHub_Main_Dark.svg`)
- `codzhub-app-icon.svg` (copied from `Identity_Pack/Logos/SVG/CodzHub_App_Icon.svg`)
- `codzhub-wordmark-light.svg` (copied from `Identity_Pack/Logos/SVG/CodzHub_Wordmark_Light.svg`)
- `codzhub-wordmark-dark.svg` (copied from `Identity_Pack/Logos/SVG/CodzHub_Wordmark_Dark.svg`)
